item.title: Detransitioner: ‘Gender-Affirming Care’ Was The Least Caring Thing Ever Done To Me
item.description: What saved me was not affirmation of untruth but affirmation of reality.

item.title: CBS Sets Out to Debunk Trump, Ends Up Proving Him Right
item.description: The '60 Minutes' report fixates on a semantic issue while conceding the underlying reality of violence against white farmers in South Africa.

item.title: Striking Down Tariffs, SCOTUS Gives Congress Permission To Be Useless
item.description: The judges let Congress off the hook, further incentivizing the legislature’s dereliction while effectively usurping power from the political branches...

item.title: Self-Obsessed ‘Looksmaxxing’ Culture Subverts Traditional Masculinity
item.description: Consider what other ideologies aim to dissociate a person from their body to the point of physical mutilation.

item.title: Democrats Can’t Seriously Believe ID Requirements Are Civil Rights Violations
item.description: Democrats do not want the specious nature of their charge of racism to be revealed, let alone adjudicated.
